name: soundcore Liberty 4 Pro Noise Cancelling True-Wireless Earbuds
description:
Matchless Noise Cancellation: 7 sensors detect noise from every angle. From planes to trains, enjoy a serene journey with 3× stronger noise reduction. Real-Time Adaptive Noise Reduction: Adapts to your ever-changing environment every 0.3 seconds, ensuring optimal, seamless noise reduction. Effortless Controls: The case's touch bar and display let you fine-tune the noise-cancelling levels at any time with a simple swipe on the case. Studio-Level High-Fidelity Music: Indulge in crisp, full-bodied sound with ACAA, a 10.5mm driver, a titanium-coated tweeter, and a digital crossover. Super Fast Charging: Charge 2× faster. A 5-minute refuel offers 4 hours of playtime. Up to 10 hours from one charge and up to 40 hours with the case. 6-Mic AI Clear Calls: With a noise cancelling algorithm, a wind noise reduction tech, and six microphones, enjoy clear calls wherever you are.
Official Soundcore merchandising imagery confirms the exact product variant used for this listing.
shortDescription: Matchless Noise Cancellation: 7 sensors detect noise from every angle.

name: soundcore Liberty 5 Noise-Cancelling Earbuds with Dolby Audio
description:
2x Stronger Voice Reduction: With ANC 3.0 and a purpose-built acoustic cavity. Real-Time Adaptive ANC 3.0: Adjusts every 0.3 seconds to ensure a quiet space. Immersive Dolby Audio: Takes you to the front seat of any performance. Detail-Rich Sound: Via wool-paper diaphragms and bass tubes. Supports LDAC and Hi-Res Audio. Natural, Crystal-Clear Calls: With 6 mics, AI, and a wind-resistant algorithm. 12H/48H ANC Off, 8H/32H ANC On: A 10-minute charge gives you another 5 hours.
Official Soundcore merchandising imagery confirms the exact product variant used for this listing.
shortDescription: 2x Stronger Voice Reduction: With ANC 3.0 and a purpose-built acoustic cavity.

name: soundcore AeroClip Open-Ear Clip-On Earbuds with Adaptive Comfort
description:
Adaptive Ultra-Comfort: Designed to relieve in-ear discomfort, soundcore AeroClip open-ear clip-on earbuds let you enjoy music pressure-free for every outdoor venture. Flexible, Secure Fit: soundcore AeroClip clip-on earbuds boast an adaptive open-ring design that endures 20,000 bends. Feather-light and flexible, they stay secure for all-day wear. Clearer Audio , Richer Bass: Enjoy ultra-clear, rich bass sound with in-ear-level quality. Our advanced virtual bass technology enriches the lows, complemented by a 12mm*12mm titanium-coated driver for clear listening. AI-Boosted Clear Calls: With 4 beamforming mics, wind-blocking meshes, and advanced AI, experience flawless calls, even in the busiest street . Effortlessly Chic: Your style, your vibe. In three vibrant looks, these open-ear clip-on earbuds deliver incredible audio with a touch of flair.
Official Soundcore merchandising imagery confirms the exact product variant used for this listing.
shortDescription: Adaptive Ultra-Comfort: Designed to relieve in-ear discomfort, soundcore AeroClip open-ear clip-on earbuds let you enjoy music pressure-f...

name: AeroFit 2 Pr Dual-Form Earbuds with Open-Ear and Active Noise Cancellation Form
description:
One Switch, Two Forms: Adjust the ear hooks to seamlessly access Open-Ear and Active Noise Cancellation forms. Whether you're using it during workouts or your commute, AeroFit 2 Pro adapts seamlessly to every part of your day. Open-Ear Form—Comfort With Every Wear: Stay comfortable all day thanks to the open-ear design that keeps your ears breathable. The skin-friendly liquid silicone ear hooks ensure a soft, pressure-free fit. Active Noise Cancellation Form—Reduce Noise for Deep Focus: Be heard in noisy environments. These earbuds effectively reduce background noise so you can enjoy clear, private listening whether you're on a busy street or a noisy subway station. Experience Theater-Like Sound: Immerse yourself in studio-grade sound powered by 11.8 mm composite drivers, Hi-Res audio, and LDAC technology. With dynamic head tracking, sound moves all around you—delivering a vivid, theatre-like experience. AI-Boosted Clear Calls: With 4 mics and AI-boosted call technology, your conversations come through with precision and sharpness—ensuring reliable clarity even on a busy street. Will AeroFit 2 Pro Fit Me: While AeroFit 2 Pro fits roughly 90% of ears, trust our 30-day money-back guarantee and try them for yourself, rather than rely on the measurements alone.
Official Soundcore merchandising imagery confirms the exact product variant used for this listing.
shortDescription: One Switch, Two Forms: Adjust the ear hooks to seamlessly access Open-Ear and Active Noise Cancellation forms.

name: soundcore AeroFit 2 AI Assistant AI Translation for a Connected World
description:
Stay Comfortable, Stay Aware: With soft materials and a non-invasive design, the earbuds deliver all-day comfort and breathability, keeping you attuned to the world while enjoying music. Free Al Translation: Supports real-time translation with high accuracy in 100 languages globally. Whether on tropical vacations or at global conferences, stay in the loop wherever life takes you. Voice Control AI Assistant for Instant Help: Simply say "Hey Anka" and speak after the beep. Anka, our intuitive AI assistant, provides instant support to help you stay effortlessly productive. Enjoy free support at any time. Pressure-Free Fit for Every Ear: Double-curved surface and soundcore's innovative 4-level adjustable ear hooks ensure a pressure-free fit tailored to over 99% of ear shapes and sizes. Vibrant Bass: Enjoy deep bass fueled by 20 mm × 11.5 mm racetrack drivers and BassTurbo acoustics. With Bluetooth 5.4 and LDAC support, experience stable, high-resolution audio transmission. Wireless Recharge, Long Playtime: Place the case on a wireless charger for tangle-free recharging. Get up to 8.5 hours of music on a single charge, extendable to 35 hours with the case.
Official Soundcore merchandising imagery confirms the exact product variant used for this listing.
shortDescription: Stay Comfortable, Stay Aware: With soft materials and a non-invasive design, the earbuds deliver all-day comfort and breathability, keepi...

name: soundcore AeroFit 2 Adjustable Open-Ear Wireless Earbuds
description:
Stay Aware, Stay Comfortable： AeroFit 2 open-ear headphones offer all-day comfort with soft materials and a non-invasive, double-curved design, keeping you attuned to the world while enjoying music. A Perfect Fit for Every Ear： soundcore's innovative 4-level adjustable ear hooks ensure a comfortable fit tailored to over 99% of ear shapes and sizes. Close to the Ear Canal for Deeper Bass : Adjustable ear hooks bring the sound closer, delivering the bass you crave. With a maximum boost of 7.5dB over non-adjustable hooks, enjoy richer, more powerful bass. Free Al Translation: Supports more than 100 languages, real-time response, and high accuracy. From tropical vacations to global conferences, stay in the loop wherever life takes you. Note: Ensure the soundcore app is version 3.8.7 or later and the earbud firmware is updated to the latest version. Rich Sound: Deep bass, clear mids, and vivid treble, fueled by 20mm × 11.5mm racetrack drivers and BassTurbo acoustics. Indulge in full-bodied wireless Hi-Res audio, refined by LDAC. Wireless Recharge, Long Playtime: Place the case on a wireless charger for a tangle-free recharge. Get up to 10 hours of music on a single charge, extendable to 42 hours with the case.
Official Soundcore merchandising imagery confirms the exact product variant used for this listing.
shortDescription: Stay Aware, Stay Comfortable： AeroFit 2 open-ear headphones offer all-day comfort with soft materials and a non-invasive, double-curved d...

description:

Drivers with Triple Composite Diaphragms: Enjoy Hi-Res distortionless audio. Long-Lasting Listening: Listen up to 40 hours with ANC and 60 hours without. description:
Flippable Audio Magic: Rotate the dual 10W Dolby Audio speakers 90° side to side or 200° up and down for sound that follows your vibe, perfect for any setup or scene. True Brightness, Real Clarity: Enjoy lifelike details with TÜV‑certified 380 ANSI lumens and 1080p Full HD resolution that make every movie night pop. Designed for Consistent Viewing: All‑glass lenses and fully sealed optical engine resist dust and wear, keeping every frame crisp and clear even after hours of play. Smart Instant Setup (IEA 3.0): Just plug in and go. Autofocus, auto keystone correction, obstacle avoidance, and screen fit instantly deliver a perfect view every time. Google TV, Stream It All: Access Netflix, YouTube, Prime Video, and more right from the projector—no extra devices needed, just endless entertainment anywhere.

name: Anker C300 DC Power Bank Station
description:
To activate C300 DC Portable Power Station for the first time: Recharge with an 18W or higher USB-C wall charger, such as an Anker USB-C charger or laptop charger. Note that only the USB-C2 and USB-C3 ports can be used. Massive Power on the Go: Take portable power anywhere and deliver 300W and 288Wh to your devices. Fast charge with two 140W two-way USB-C ports. LiFePO4 battery with a 3-year guarantee: featuring LiFePO4 batteries, smart temperature control, and impact-resistant design ensures this power station lasts for years, providing reliable and durable performance in any situation. 7 Device Charging Ports: Power all your tech with versatile ports, including 1× car socket (120W), 2× USB-C (140W), 1× USB-C (100W), 1× USB-C (15W), and 2× USB-A (12W). Go Anywhere Design: Embrace full portability with a 30% smaller design than similar power stations. Attach the strap (sold separately) for more convenience. Solar-Powered Escapes: When your journey needs endless charging, do so seamlessly and sustainably with a 100W solar panel. We recommend 100W or 60W Anker Solar Panel. This power station is not compatible with Anker SOLIX PS30 (or other 5V~3A USB-C panels), PS200, PS400. Your Choice of Recharging: Fast Recharge to 80% in an hour with the dual PD 3.1 USB-C port, or use solar panels or your car. Stay charged, no matter where you are. What is in the Box: Anker SOLIX C300 DC Portable Power Station, 60cm 140W USB-C to C charging cable, Safety Manual, and Warranty Info
Official Soundcore merchandising imagery confirms the exact product variant used for this listing.
shortDescription: To activate C300 DC Portable Power Station for the first time: Recharge with an 18W or higher USB-C wall charger, such as an Anker USB-C...

name: Motion+ | Portable Speaker with Intense Bass
description:
Hi-res Audio: motion+ is equipped with stunning Hi-Res Audio which is further enhanced by Qualcomm aptX for lossless music reproduction when streaming via Bluetooth. Huge sound with intense bass: packed with two Ultra high-frequency tweeters, neodymium woofers, and passive radiators to fill every corner of your room with 30W of rich sound. Low frequencies are enhanced in real-time by our exclusive bassuptm technology. Exceptional depth and clarity: motion+’s Ultra-wide frequency range stretches from 50 Hz to 40 kHz and is paired with an advanced DSP to ensure all the details and idiosyncrasies of a song are faithfully reproduced. IPX7 waterproof: fully-waterproof casing provides an impenetrable barrier against liquids. 12-Hour playtime: motion+’s built-in 6, 700 mAh battery lets you effortlessly soundtrack wild weekends, cozy evenings, or long summer days outdoors. Motion Plus speakers bought after November 2022 do not suppport TWS pairing with Motion Plus speakers purchased prior to November 2022.
Official Soundcore merchandising imagery confirms the exact product variant used for this listing.
shortDescription: Hi-res Audio: motion+ is equipped with stunning Hi-Res Audio which is further enhanced by Qualcomm aptX for lossless music reproduction w...

name: Spirit X2 | True-Wireless Sport Earphones
description:
100% More Bass : Inspired by technology found in high-end speakers, BassTurbo positions an acoustic chamber behind the driver to add powerful bass resonance. BassUp technology, then injects even more bass intensity via a custom algorithm. Extreme Sweatproof : IP68 defend against dust and water with SweatGuard technology to resist the corrosive nature of sweat. Lasts 100x longer than ordinary true wireless earbuds thanks to a submarine structure and hydrophobic nano coating. Incredible Endurance : Get 9 hours of intense listening from a single charge and boost that to 36 hours with the included charging case. That’s up to 5 weeks of workouts on a single charge. Effortless Comfort : True wireless earbuds with extra-flex eartips and hooks ensure a free, satisfying, and invincible fit, no matter how hardcore your workout. Comes with an extensive selection of tips and wings for tailored listening. Clear Calls : cVc 8.0 noise reduction effectively isolates your voice while removing background noise. You’re heard clearly from any location. Better Bluetooth : Qualcomm aptX audio technology delivers exceptional, lossless sound quality over your Bluetooth connection.
Official Soundcore merchandising imagery confirms the exact product variant used for this listing.

description:
The Allbirds Wool Runner is the orginal wool sneaker that started it all. Called the world's most comfortable shoe, it's flexible, supportive, astonishingly soft, and machine washable. name: Amazon Logo Hoodie - Meteorite Black Tidal Teal
description:
Each item sold from the Amazon capsule, including this hoodie, will plant trees in the Amazon rainforest. These trees will help to strengthen one of the world’s most important carbon storehouses, and protect the habitat for wild animals like the Blue Morpho Butterfly, the Green Anaconda, jaguar, macaw, puma, and sloth.
The colorway in the product name comes from the official option data and matches the feed image.
shortDescription: Each item sold from the Amazon capsule, including this hoodie, will plant trees in the Amazon rainforest.

name: Woodrow Hoodie - Meteorite Black Multi Stripe
description:
A pullover hoodie that gets better with every wash. Here, we reached for our organic cotton brushed twill fleece — a well-worn fabrication known for its incredible softness. We designed the Woodrow for an easy throw-on hoodie that works just as well at beach bonfires as it does on lakeside evenings. And after some very, ahem, scientific testing, we’ve concluded it does.
The colorway in the product name comes from the official option data and matches the feed image.

name: Silo Cutlery
description:
Streamlined yet soulful, the Silo Cutlery brings modern form to the timeless ritual of gathering around the table. Crafted with a vintage-inspired finish, each piece is perfectly weighted and designed to feel both elevated and effortless in hand. Clean lines and subtle texture strike a balance between contemporary design and lasting tradition. Whether it’s a weeknight dinner or a holiday feast, this set is made to be passed around — and passed down. name: Dinner Napkins Double Sided Drift - Quiet Season
description:
The Quiet Season Collection introduces a grounded palette rooted in nature’s more contemplative tones. The new Drift pattern reimagines classic weaving motifs in a softened spectrum—gold, bayleaf, soil, apricot, and dusty blue—bringing a sense of quiet rhythm to the table. Each cloth napkin in the double-sided collection reveals a coordinated design on the reverse, with shifts in pattern scale and tone that add subtle dimension. Printed on 100% cotton shantung, the fabric’s gentle texture and fluid drape bring tactile richness to the table. Dinner napkins are sold as a set of 4. Made in Japan. name: Dinner Napkins Sabi Mixed Sets
description:
Tortuga Forma's luxurious Sabi dinner napkins transform table settings with the philosophy of wabi sabi—celebrating beautiful imperfection through irregular slubs, rich dyes, and a distinctive texture. For a curated look of mixed napkin sets, choose from Terrane, inspired by rich earth tones, or Tide, drawing from the varied blue-green and grays of ocean depths. Machine woven from 100% cotton using a traditional textile originally used for everyday kimonos, these table linens are made for formal dining but bring elegance to casual occasions. Like a favorite pair of denim, Sabi gets better with time and is meant to be washed frequently, developing a lived-in softness with time. Dinner napkins are sold as a set of 4. name: Neutral Era
description:
Get 10 essential Shadow Stix neutrals in one set! Meet your new go-to eyeshadow stick for bold colour and easy glam. Shadow Stix deliver creamy, high-impact pigment in a single swipe and set to a long-lasting finish that won’t budge. Use it as an all-over lid colour, as a base to boost powder shadow, or smudge it along the lash line for a quick smoky moment. Built-in sharpener = always on point. name: Paradise Cove
description:
Get that “just-got-back-from-vacay” bronze – no boarding pass required. Our Liquid Bronzer delivers natural, sunkissed warmth with a second-skin finish. This long-lasting, comfy formula feels weightless on skin and seamlessly layers over foundation without lifting your base. Plus, it’s totally mistake-proof - no more orange, muddy or streaky bronzer! Infused with Squalane for a smooth glide, Calendula to soothe skin and Vitamin E for extra hydration. Choose from six flexible shades inspired by our sunny California beaches for a soft golden wash or build it up for ultra-bronzed definition.
ColourPop feed imagery is preserved so the thumbnail matches the exact shade or item name.

name: Mermaid Kisses
description:

Lippie Pencil defines lips with a creamy, long-lasting formula, while our Lippie Stix delivers rich Matte X pigment in one swipe. Infused with Vitamin E, Mango, Avocado, and Shea Butter for a moisturizing boost + comfy feel. The Ocean Will Be Mine Lip Kit - A limited-edition deep mauve lip combo inspired by Ursula’s bold, dramatic energy! Lippie Pencil defines lips with a creamy, long-lasting formula, while our Lippie Stix delivers rich Matte X pigment in one swipe. Infused with Vitamin E, Mango, Avocado, and Shea Butter for a moisturizing boost + comfy feel. Glowy Lip Oil - Shine like Ariel with our new nourishing lip oil inspired by your fave mermaid and glassy ocean reflections. Swipe on this two-tone formula that goes on clear and features holographic flakes for sparkling, glazed lips. Infused with hydrating Sunflower Seed, Meadowfoam Seed + Jojoba Oils and nourishing Vitamin E. description:

Or unfold to reveal a moisture-wicking, non-slip surface ideal for any and every movement. Lightweight and travel-friendly, The Compact Mat is a must-have whether you’re WFH, in studio or on-the-go. The Compact Mat is FINAL SALE and not eligible for refunds or exchanges.

name: Everyday Folder - Iridescent
description:
Introducing our limited Anniversary releases: Iridescent and Forgedfetti. Thirteen years of material innovation has led to these advanced finishing processes—Iridescent's precision heat treatment that creates shifting color through vaporized metal, and Forgedfetti's extreme-pressure forging that combines carbon fiber with aluminum shards.
The image URL comes directly from Ridge's own product feed and is not reused elsewhere in the dataset.
shortDescription: Introducing our limited Anniversary releases: Iridescent and Forgedfetti.

name: Atomic Habits
description:
A practical guide to building better habits through tiny, repeatable improvements.
Pairs behavioral science with usable systems for work, health, and daily routines.
shortDescription: Atomic Habits by James Clear.

name: The Psychology of Money
description:
Short essays on behavior, wealth, and long-term financial decision-making.
Useful for readers who want clearer thinking about risk, compounding, and enoughness.
shortDescription: The Psychology of Money by Morgan Housel.

name: Deep Work
description:
A focused argument for protecting time for concentrated, high-value work.
Blends strategy, case studies, and routines for better attention in distracted environments.
shortDescription: Deep Work by Cal Newport.

name: Sapiens
description:
A sweeping history of humanity from early hunter-gatherers to modern institutions.
Popular science writing that connects culture, economics, and shared belief systems.
shortDescription: Sapiens by Yuval Noah Harari.

name: Thinking, Fast and Slow
description:
A landmark exploration of intuitive and deliberate thinking.
Explains the biases and decision patterns that shape everyday judgments.
shortDescription: Thinking, Fast and Slow by Daniel Kahneman.

name: The Midnight Library
description:
A novel about regret, possibility, and alternate versions of one life.
Balances speculative fiction with an accessible emotional core.
shortDescription: The Midnight Library by Matt Haig.

name: Educated
description:
A memoir about self-invention, family loyalty, and education's transformative force.
Sharp, reflective writing makes it a strong contemporary nonfiction pick.
shortDescription: Educated by Tara Westover.

name: The Alchemist
description:
A modern fable about purpose, persistence, and following a personal calling.
A perennial bestseller with a concise, giftable format.
shortDescription: The Alchemist by Paulo Coelho.

name: Where the Crawdads Sing
description:
A literary mystery set against the marshes of coastal North Carolina.
Combines coming-of-age storytelling with a courtroom plotline.
shortDescription: Where the Crawdads Sing by Delia Owens.

name: The Silent Patient
description:
A psychological thriller centered on a famous painter who stops speaking.
Built around sharp pacing, short chapters, and a major late reveal.
shortDescription: The Silent Patient by Alex Michaelides.

name: Dune
description:
A science fiction epic of empire, ecology, prophecy, and political power.
Still one of the genre's most recognizable gateway novels.
shortDescription: Dune by Frank Herbert.

name: The Martian
description:
A problem-solving survival story set on Mars with a strong engineering bent.
Its brisk voice and technical puzzles make it a dependable crossover favorite.
shortDescription: The Martian by Andy Weir.

name: The Four Agreements
description:
A compact self-development classic built around four behavioral principles.
Frequently bought as a personal reset or giftable wellness read.
shortDescription: The Four Agreements by Don Miguel Ruiz.

name: Ikigai
description:
An approachable lifestyle book about purpose, longevity, and daily rhythm.
Combines interviews, cultural framing, and practical takeaways.
shortDescription: Ikigai by Hector Garcia and Francesc Miralles.

name: The Mountain Is You
description:
A contemporary self-help title about self-sabotage and personal growth.
Popular with readers looking for reflective, journal-adjacent nonfiction.
shortDescription: The Mountain Is You by Brianna Wiest.
